outfit_info.outfit_description: A relaxed urban ensemble features a navy tee beneath a light blue denim jacket with a cozy collar. Dark track pants with side stripes, chunky sneakers, and a black newsboy cap complete the look. A crossbody bag and pendant necklace add practical and stylish details, perfect for a casual outing.

model_attributes.body: Average build, well-proportioned, exuding a comfortable and self-assured demeanor.
model_attributes.pose: Standing casually, holding a drink, with a relaxed and contemplative side glance.
model_attributes.background: A dark, futuristic space illuminated by vibrant neon lights, hinting at a retro-tech arcade or cyber environment.

outfit.P01078459: blue denim field jacket with brown collar
